checks.basis: Idle (undriven) open-drain SDA: the 4.7k pull-up ties SDA to the 5V rail and no device pulls it low, so no current flows through the pull-up and V(SDA) = V(rail) = 5.000V. Electrical-only I2C sensor stub.

Idle (undriven) open-drain SCL: same as SDA, the 4.7k pull-up holds SCL at the 5V rail (5.000V). The sensor's supply draw is modelled by a 1mA generic_load between rail and ground; its data value is out of analog scope (M8).
